blockingIssues.description: Hostname validation uses `hostname.includes('douyin.com')`, which incorrectly accepts attacker-controlled domains like `douyin.com.evil.com` or `notdouyin.com`. This can misclassify unsupported links as supported and create sessions for invalid domains. Validation must require exact approved hosts (e.g., `www.douyin.com`, `douyin.com`, `v.douyin.com`) instead of substring matching.

rejectedObservations.observation: URL-validation pitfall note for strict hostname allowlists
